message:
fix(postgres): second review pass — doc mut, parse_error_response semantics

- Fix module doc example: `let conn` → `let mut conn` since
  query_params requires &mut self
- Fix parse_error_response: return Ok(PgError::Server{...}) for
  successfully parsed error responses, reserve Err for when parsing
  the error message itself fails (e.g. truncated data). All call sites
  already handle both arms identically so behavior is unchanged.
- Update parse_error_response tests: unwrap_err → unwrap to match
  the corrected return semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
